STALL_FRONTEND_TLB.description: Counts when the frontend is stalled on any TLB misses being handled. This event also counts the TLB accesses made by hardware prefetches.

STALL_FRONTEND_CPUBOUND.title: Frontend stall cycles, processor bound
STALL_FRONTEND_CPUBOUND.description: Counts cycles when the frontend could not send any micro-operations to the dispatch stage due to resource constraints in the CPU resources excluding memory resources.

STALL_FRONTEND_FLOW.title: Frontend stall cycles, flow control
STALL_FRONTEND_FLOW.description: Counts cycles when the frontend could not send any micro-operations to the dispatch stage due to resource constraints in the branch prediction unit.

STALL_FRONTEND_FLUSH.title: Frontend stall cycles, flush recovery
STALL_FRONTEND_FLUSH.description: Counts cycles when the frontend could not send any micro-operations to the dispatch stage as the frontend is recovering from a machine flush or resteer. Example scenarios that cause a flush include branch mispredictions, taken exceptions, micro-architectural flush etc.

STALL_BACKEND_MEMBOUND.title: Backend stall cycles, memory bound
STALL_BACKEND_MEMBOUND.description: Counts cycles when the backend could not accept any micro-operations primarily due to memory pressure.

STALL_BACKEND_L1D.title: Backend stall cycles, level 1 data cache
STALL_BACKEND_L1D.description: Counts cycles when the backend is stalled, and there is a demand data miss in the L1 data cache.

STALL_BACKEND_TLB.title: Backend stall cycles, TLB
STALL_BACKEND_TLB.description: Counts cycles when the backend is stalled on any demand TLB misses being handled.

STALL_BACKEND_ST.title: Backend stall cycles, store
STALL_BACKEND_ST.description: Counts cycles when the backend is stalled, and a store cannot be sent to the store buffer.

STALL_BACKEND_CPUBOUND.title: Backend stall cycles, processor bound
STALL_BACKEND_CPUBOUND.description: Counts cycles when the backend could not accept any micro-operations due to any resource constraints in the CPU.

STALL_BACKEND_BUSY.title: Backend stall cycles, backend busy
STALL_BACKEND_BUSY.description: Counts cycles when the backend could not accept any micro-operations because of a lack of specific structural resources required for execution.

STALL_BACKEND_ILOCK.title: Backend stall cycles, input dependency
STALL_BACKEND_ILOCK.description: Counts cycles when the backend could not accept any micro-operations because of an instruction interlock - that is, a dependency between instructions, such as a register dependency.

STALL_BACKEND_ATOMIC.title: Backend stall cycles, atomic operation
STALL_BACKEND_ATOMIC.description: Counts cycles when the backend is stalled and an atomic operation is in progress.

STALL_BACKEND_MEMCPYSET.title: Backend stall cycles, Memory Copy or Set operation
STALL_BACKEND_MEMCPYSET.description:
The counter counts each cycle counted by STALL_BACKEND_MEMBOUND when the backend is
processing an Memory Copy or Set instruction.
The Memory Copy instructions are CPY and CPYF. The Memory Set instructions are SET and SETG.

CAS_NEAR_FAIL.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, Compare and Swap fail
CAS_NEAR_FAIL.description: This event counts compare and swap instructions that executed locally to the PE and did not update the location accessed.

CAS_NEAR_PASS.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, Compare and Swap pass
CAS_NEAR_PASS.description: This event counts compare and swap instructions that executed locally to the PE and updated the location accessed.

CAS_NEAR_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, Compare and Swap near
CAS_NEAR_SPEC.description: This event counts compare and swap instructions that executed locally to the PE.

CAS_FAR_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, Compare and Swap far
CAS_FAR_SPEC.description: This event counts compare and swap instructions that did not execute locally to the PE.

CAS_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, Compare and Swap
CAS_SPEC.description: This event counts the total compare and swap instructions that were executed.

LSE_LD_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, load
LSE_LD_SPEC.description: This event counts the total atomic memory instructions that return a value that were speculatively executed.

LSE_ST_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, store
LSE_ST_SPEC.description: This event counts the total atomic memory instructions that do not return a value that were speculatively executed.

LSE_LDST_SPEC.title: Atomic memory Operation speculatively executed, load or store
LSE_LDST_SPEC.description: This event counts the total atomic memory instructions that were speculatively executed.

BRNL_INDNR_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, indirect branch without link excluding procedure return, taken
BRNL_INDNR_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed indirect branch without link instructions, excluding return instructions, that were taken.

BL_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, branch with link, taken
BL_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed branch with link instructions that were taken.

BRNL_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, branch without link, taken
BRNL_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed branch without link instructions that were taken.

BL_IND_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, indirect branch with link, taken
BL_IND_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed indirect branch with link instructions that were taken.

BRNL_IND_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, indirect branch without link, taken
BRNL_IND_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed indirect branch without link instructions that were taken.

BL_IMMED_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, direct branch with link, taken
BL_IMMED_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed direct branch with link instructions that were taken.

BRNL_IMMED_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, direct branch without link, taken
BRNL_IMMED_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed direct branch without link instructions that were taken.

BR_UNCOND_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, unconditional branch
BR_UNCOND_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed unconditional branch instructions.

BR_COND_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, conditional branch
BR_COND_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed conditional branch instructions.

BR_COND_TAKEN_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, conditional branch, taken
BR_COND_TAKEN_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed conditional branch instructions that were taken.

BR_HINT_COND_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, hinted conditional.
BR_HINT_COND_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed hinted conditional branches.

BR_HINT_COND_PRED_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, predicted hinted conditional.
BR_HINT_COND_PRED_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed hinted conditional branches that were correctly predicted.

BR_HINT_COND_MIS_PRED_RETIRED.title: Branch instruction architecturally executed, mispredicted hinted conditional
BR_HINT_COND_MIS_PRED_RETIRED.description: Counts architecturally executed hinted conditional branches that were mispredicted and caused a pipeline flush.

DTLB_WALK_BLOCK.title: Data TLB block translation table walk
DTLB_WALK_BLOCK.description: Counts number of demand data translation table walks caused by a miss in the L2 TLB and yielding a block descriptor at level 1 or level 2 of the translation.

ITLB_WALK_BLOCK.title: Instruction TLB block translation table walk
ITLB_WALK_BLOCK.description: Counts number of instruction translation table walks caused by a miss in the L2 TLB and yielding a block descriptor at level 1 or level 2 of the translation.

DTLB_WALK_PAGE.title: Data TLB page translation table walk
DTLB_WALK_PAGE.description: Counts number of demand data translation table walks caused by a miss in the L2 TLB and yielding a page descriptor at level 1 or level 2 of the translation.

ITLB_WALK_PAGE.title: Instruction TLB page translation table walk
ITLB_WALK_PAGE.description: Counts number of instruction translation table walks caused by a miss in the L2 TLB and yielding a page descriptor at level 3 of the translation.

BUS_REQ_RD.title: Bus request, read
BUS_REQ_RD.description: Counts memory read requests issued by the complex to the downstream memory system.

BUS_REQ_WR.title: Bus request, write
BUS_REQ_WR.description: Counts memory write transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus.

BUS_REQ.title: Bus request
BUS_REQ.description: Counts memory transaction requests issued by the CPU to the external bus.

ISNP_HIT_RD.title: Snoop hit, demand instruction fetch
ISNP_HIT_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Instruction memory access that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE.

ISNP_HIT_NEAR_RD.title: Snoop hit in near cache, demand instruction fetch
ISNP_HIT_NEAR_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Instruction memory access counted by ISNP_HIT_RD that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE in the local PE cluster.

ISNP_HIT_FAR_RD.title: Snoop hit in far cache, demand instruction fetch
ISNP_HIT_FAR_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Instruction memory access counted by ISNP_HIT_RD that hits in a cache outside the local PE cluster on the same device.

DSNP_HIT_RD.title: Snoop hit, demand data read
DSNP_HIT_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RW that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE.

DSNP_HIT_NEAR_RD.title: Snoop hit in near cache, demand data read
DSNP_HIT_NEAR_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RD that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE in the local PE cluster.

DSNP_HIT_FAR_RD.title: Snoop hit in far cache, demand data read
DSNP_HIT_FAR_RD.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RD that hits in a cache outside the local PE cluster on the same device.

DSNP_HIT_WR.title: Snoop hit, demand data write
DSNP_HIT_WR.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-write operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RW that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE.

DSNP_HIT_NEAR_WR.title: Snoop hit in near cache, demand data write
DSNP_HIT_NEAR_WR.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-write operation counted by DSNP_HIT_WR that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE in the local PE cluster.

DSNP_HIT_FAR_WR.title: Snoop hit in far cache, demand data write
DSNP_HIT_FAR_WR.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-write operation counted by DSNP_HIT_WR that hits in a cache outside the local PE cluster on the same device.

DSNP_HIT_RW.title: Snoop hit, demand data access
DSNP_HIT_RW.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation or demand Memory-write operation that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE.

DSNP_HIT_NEAR_RW.title: Snoop hit in near cache, demand data access
DSNP_HIT_NEAR_RW.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation or demand Memory-write operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RW that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE in the local PE cluster.

DSNP_HIT_FAR_RW.title: Snoop hit in far cache, demand data access
DSNP_HIT_FAR_RW.description: The counter counts each snoop generated in response to a demand Memory-read operation or demand Memory-write operation counted by DSNP_HIT_RW that hits in a cache outside the local PE cluster on the same device.

DSNP_HIT.title: Snoop hit, data
DSNP_HIT.description: The counter counts each snoop that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE.

DSNP_HIT_NEAR.title: Snoop hit in near cache, data
DSNP_HIT_NEAR.description: The counter counts each snoop counted by DSNP_HIT that hits in a cache outside of the cache hierarchy of this PE in the local PE cluster.

DSNP_HIT_FAR.title: Snoop hit in far cache, data
DSNP_HIT_FAR.description: The counter counts each snoop counted by DSNP_HIT that hits in a cache outside the local PE cluster on the same device.

L1D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.title: Level 1 data cache refill, hardware prefetch
L1D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.description: Counts L1 data cache refills where the cache line is requested by a hardware prefetcher.

L2D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache refill, hardware prefetch
L2D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF.description: Counts L2 cache refills for accesses generated by hardware prefetchers targeting the L2 cache.

L1I_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: Level 1 instruction cache demand fetch hit
L1I_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: Counts demand instruction fetches that access the L1 instruction cache and hit in the L1 instruction cache.

L2I_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: Level 2 instruction cache demand fetch hit
L2I_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: Counts L2I cache accesses that hit in the L2 cache.

L1D_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: Level 1 data cache demand hit, read
L1D_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: Counts cache line hits in the L1 data cache for memory read operations.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: Level 2 data cache demand hit, read
L2D_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: Counts L2 cache hits due to demand memory read operations.

L3D_CACHE_HIT_RD.title: Level 3 data cache demand hit, read
L3D_CACHE_HIT_RD.description: The counter counts each demand read counted by L3D_CACHE_RD that hits in the Level 3 data or unified cache.

L1D_CACHE_HIT_WR.title: Level 1 data cache demand access hit, write
L1D_CACHE_HIT_WR.description: Counts cache line hits in the L1 data cache for memory write operations.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_WR.title: Level 2 data cache demand access hit, write
L2D_CACHE_HIT_WR.description: Counts L2 cache hits due to memory write operations.

L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW.title: Level 1 data cache demand access hit
L1D_CACHE_HIT_RW.description: Counts cache line hits in the L1 data cache for memory read and write operations.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_RW.title: Level 2 data cache demand access hit
L2D_CACHE_HIT_RW.description: Counts L2 cache demand hits from any load/store operations or instruction fetches.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand first hit, read, fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_CACHE_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.description: Counts L2 cache hits due to demand memory read operations, which are the first demand hit on a cache line prefetched by a hardware prefetcher into the L2 cache.

L3D_CACHE_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.title: Level 3 data cache demand first hit, read, fetched by hardware prefetcher
L3D_CACHE_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.description: The counter counts each first hit counted by L3D_CACHE_HIT_RW_FHWPRF that is a demand Memory-read operation.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand access first hit, write, fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_CACHE_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.description: Counts L2 cache hits due to demand memory write operations, which are the first demand hit on a cache line prefetched by a hardware prefetcher into the L2 cache.

L2D_CACHE_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand access first hit, fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_CACHE_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.description: Counts L2 cache hits due to demand memory operations, which are the first demand hit on a cache line prefetched by a hardware prefetcher into the L2 cache.

L1I_CACHE_HIT.title: Level 1 instruction cache hit
L1I_CACHE_HIT.description: Counts instruction fetches that access the L1 instruction cache and hit in the L1 instruction cache. Instruction cache accesses caused by cache maintenance operations are not counted.

L1D_CACHE_HIT.title: Level 1 data cache hit
L1D_CACHE_HIT.description: Counts cache line hits in the L1 data cache.

L2D_CACHE_HIT.title: Level 2 data cache hit
L2D_CACHE_HIT.description: Counts L2 cache hits. For the L2D_CACHE_HIT events, an L2 cache hit is only counted if the operation is satisfied internally by L2 (i.e. no bus request, no snoop to lower level).

L2D_CACHE_HIT_PRFM.title: Level 2 data cache software preload hit
L2D_CACHE_HIT_PRFM.description: Counts L2 cache hits for accesses generated by prefetch instructions targeting the L2 cache.

L1I_LFB_HIT_RD.title: Level 1 instruction cache demand fetch line-fill buffer hit
L1I_LFB_HIT_RD.description: Counts demand instruction fetches that access the L1 instruction cache and hit in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 instruction cache.

L1D_LFB_HIT_RD.title: Level 1 data cache demand line-fill buffer hit, read
L1D_LFB_HIT_RD.description: Counts load data accesses that access the L1 data cache and hit in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache.

L2D_LFB_HIT_RD.title: Level 2 data cache demand line-fill buffer hit, read
L2D_LFB_HIT_RD.description: The counter counts each demand Memory-read operation that hits a recently fetched line that is in the process of being loaded into the L2 data or unified cache. This means it will not generate a new refill, but has to wait for the previous refill to complete.

L1D_LFB_HIT_WR.title: Level 1 data cache demand access line-fill buffer hit, write
L1D_LFB_HIT_WR.description: Counts store data accesses that access the L1 data cache and hit in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache.

L2D_LFB_HIT_WR.title: Level 2 data cache demand access line-fill buffer hit, write
L2D_LFB_HIT_WR.description: The counter counts each demand Memory-write operation that hits a recently fetched line that is in the process of being loaded into the L2 data or unified cache. This means it will not generate a new refill, but has to wait for the previous refill to complete.

L1D_LFB_HIT_RW.title: Level 1 data cache demand access line-fill buffer hit
L1D_LFB_HIT_RW.description: Counts load or store data accesses that access the L1 data cache and hit in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache.

L2D_LFB_HIT_RW.title: Level 2 data cache demand access line-fill buffer hit
L2D_LFB_HIT_RW.description: The counter counts each demand access that hits a recently fetched line that is in the process of being loaded into the L2 data or unified cache. This means it will not generate a new refill, but has to wait for the previous refill to complete.

L1D_LFB_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.title: Level 1 data cache demand line-fill buffer first hit, read, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L1D_LFB_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.description: Counts the first load data access that accesses the L1 data cache and hits in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache by a hardware prefetch.

L2D_LFB_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand line-fill buffer first hit, read, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_LFB_HIT_RD_FHWPRF.description: The counter counts each demand Memory-read operation line-fill buffer first hit counted by L2D_LFB_HIT_RD where the cache line was fetched by a hardware prefetcher.

L1D_LFB_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.title: Level 1 data cache demand access line-fill buffer first hit, write, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L1D_LFB_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.description: Counts the first store data access that accesses the L1 data cache and hits in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache by a hardware prefetch.

L2D_LFB_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand access line-fill buffer first hit, write, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_LFB_HIT_WR_FHWPRF.description: The counter counts each demand Memory-write operation line-fill buffer first hit counted by L2D_LFB_HIT_WR where the cache line was fetched by a hardware prefetcher.

L1D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.title: Level 1 data cache demand access line-fill buffer first hit, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L1D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.description: Counts first load or store data accesses that access the L1 data cache and hit in a line that is in the process of being loaded into the L1 data cache.

L2D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.title: Level 2 data cache demand access line-fill buffer first hit, recently fetched by hardware prefetcher
L2D_LFB_HIT_RW_FHWPRF.description: The counter counts each demand access line-fill buffer first hit counted by L2D_LFB_HIT_RW where the cache line was fetched by a hardware prefetcher.

L1D_CACHE_PRF.title: Level 1 data cache, preload or prefetch hit
L1D_CACHE_PRF.description: Counts L1 data cache accesses from software preload or prefetch instructions or hardware prefetcher.

L2D_CACHE_PRF.title: Level 2 data cache, preload or prefetch hit
L2D_CACHE_PRF.description: Counts L2 cache accesses counted by either L2D_CACHE_HWPRF or L2D_CACHE_PRFM.

L3D_CACHE_PRF.title: Level 3 data cache, preload or prefetch hit
L3D_CACHE_PRF.description: Counts level 3 cache accesses counted by either L3D_CACHE_HWPRF or L3D_CACHE_PRFM.

LL_CACHE_PRF.title: Last level cache, preload or prefetch hit
LL_CACHE_PRF.description: The counter counts each fetch counted by either LL_CACHE_HWPRF or LL_CACHE_PRFM.

L1D_CACHE_REFILL_PRF.title: Level 1 data cache refill, preload or prefetch hit
L1D_CACHE_REFILL_PRF.description: Counts L1 data cache refills where the cache line is requested by software preload or prefetch instructions or hardware prefetcher.

L2D_CACHE_REFILL_PRF.title: Level 2 data cache refill, preload or prefetch hit
L2D_CACHE_REFILL_PRF.description: Counts L2 cache refills counted by either L2D_CACHE_REFILL_HWPRF or L2D_CACHE_REFILL_PRFM.

LL_CACHE_RW.title: Last level cache demand access
LL_CACHE_RW.description: Counts read and write  transactions that were returned from outside the core cluster.

LL_CACHE_PRFM.title: Last level cache software preload
LL_CACHE_PRFM.description:
The counter counts each access counted by LL_CACHE that is due to a preload or prefetch instruction.

This includes accesses to the Last level cache due to a refill of another cache caused by a preload or prefetch instruction.

MEM_ACCESS_RW.title: Data memory access, demand access
MEM_ACCESS_RW.description: Counts memory accesses issued by the CPU due to load and store operations.

INST_FETCH_RD.title: Instruction memory access, demand fetch
INST_FETCH_RD.description: Counts instruction memory accesses in a given cycle that are not prefetches.

DTLB_WALK_HWPRF.title: Data TLB hardware prefetch access with at least one translation table walk
DTLB_WALK_HWPRF.description: This event counts any access counted by DTLB_WALK that is due to a hardware prefetch

L1D_TLB_HWPRF.title: Level 1 data TLB access, hardware prefetch
L1D_TLB_HWPRF.description: This event counts L1 data TLB accesses due to a hardware prefetch.

SE_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD, SVE or SME data processing
SE_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each operation counted by INST_SPEC that is an Advanced SIMD, scalable vector
extension, or scalable matrix extension data-processing operation.

See ASE_SVE_SPEC and SME_SPEC for these classifications.

SME_INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, SME
SME_INST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation counted by SE_INST_SPEC that is classified as an
SME operation.

Operations due to the following instructions are counted as SME operations:

- Data-processing operations involving the ZA and ZT registers.
- Load and store operations involving the ZA and ZT registers.

Operations due to instructions added by FEAT_SME which involve the SVE registers but do not involve any
ZA or ZT registers are counted as SVE data-processing operations.

SE_INST_SPEC.title: Operation speculatively executed, Advanced SIMD, SVE, SME
SE_INST_SPEC.description:
The counter counts each speculatively executed operation counted by INST_SPEC that is classified as an
Advanced SIMD, scalable vector extension, or scalable matrix extension operation.

See ASE_SVE_INST_SPEC and SME_INST_SPEC for these classifications

ZA_ACTIVE.title: PSTATE.ZA active cycles
ZA_ACTIVE.description: The counter counts each cycle counted by CPU_CYCLES when PSTATE.ZA was enabled.

backend_bound.title: Backend Bound
backend_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total slots that were stalled due to resource constraints in the backend of the processor.

backend_busy_bound.title: Backend Busy Bound
backend_busy_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to issue queues being full to accept operations for execution.

backend_busy_ls_bound.title: Backend Busy LS Bound
backend_busy_ls_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory system issue queues being full to accept operations for execution.

backend_busy_vpu_arb_bound.title: Backend Busy VPU Arbitration Bound
backend_busy_vpu_arb_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to VPU arbitration preventing the VPU from accepting operations for execution.

backend_cache_l1d_bound.title: Backend Cache L1D Bound
backend_cache_l1d_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory access latency issues caused by level 1 data cache misses.

backend_cache_l2d_bound.title: Backend Cache L2D Bound
backend_cache_l2d_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory access latency issues caused by level 2 data cache misses.

backend_cme_backpressure_bound.title: Backend SME2 Backpressure Bound
backend_cme_backpressure_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend as the SME2 unit is busy
due to other reasons.

backend_cme_busy_arb_bound.title: Backend SME2 Arbitration Bound
backend_cme_busy_arb_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend because an SME2 unit is busy. The
instruction cannot be sent to the SME2 unit because it is waiting for arbitration.

backend_cme_cpu_bound.title: Backend SME2 CPU Bound
backend_cme_cpu_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the SME2 unit of the backend due to dependency
to the other units of CPU for execution.

backend_core_bound.title: Backend Core Bound
backend_core_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to backend core resource constraints not related to instruction fetch latency issues caused by memory access components.

backend_core_cme_bound.title: Backend Core SME2 Bound
backend_core_cme_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to the resource constraints to dispatch to the SME2 unit.

backend_mem_bound.title: Backend Memory Bound
backend_mem_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to backend core resource constraints related to memory access latency issues caused by memory access components.

backend_mem_cache_bound.title: Backend Mem Cache Bound
backend_mem_cache_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory latency issues caused by data cache misses.

backend_mem_cme_barrier_bound.title: Backend SME2 LSRT Barrier Bound
backend_mem_cme_barrier_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend as the SME2 unit is busy
because a CPU barrier waits for SME2 load/store transaction completion.

backend_mem_cme_bound.title: Backend Memory SME2 Bound
backend_mem_cme_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend caused by
load or store address hazards caused by SME2 unit memory execution dependency.
SME2 unit and PE share the CPU memory subsystem and are synchronized via the LSRT block,
causing memory execution units in them to have dependencies on data accesses.

backend_mem_cme_hazard_cpu_bound.title: Backend SME2 Memory Hazard CPU Bound
backend_mem_cme_hazard_cpu_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend
due to a SME2 LSRT hazard causing SME2 instructions to stall. SME2 unit and PE share the CPU memory subsystem and are
synchronized via the LSRT block, causing both the execution units to have dependencies
on data accesses.

backend_mem_cme_lsrt_full_bound.title: Backend SME2 LSRT Full Bound
backend_mem_cme_lsrt_full_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend as the SME2 unit is busy
due to the LSRT being full. SME2 unit and PE share the CPU memory subsystem and are
synchronized via the LSRT block, causing both execution units to have dependencies
on data accesses.

backend_mem_cpu_hazard_cme_bound.title: Backend CPU Memory Hazard SME2 Bound
backend_mem_cpu_hazard_cme_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend as the SME2 unit is busy
due to a SME2 LSRT hazard causing CPU instructions to stall. SME2 unit and PE share the CPU memory subsystem and are
synchronized via the LSRT block, causing both execution units to have dependencies
on data accesses.

backend_mem_store_bound.title: Backend Mem Store Bound
backend_mem_store_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory write pending caused by stores stalled in the pre-commit stage.

backend_mem_tlb_bound.title: Backend Mem Tlb Bound
backend_mem_tlb_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to memory access latency issues caused by data TLB misses.

backend_stall_interlock_bound.title: Backend Stall Interlock Rate
backend_stall_interlock_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend due to instruction interlocks. A high rate of interlock stalls is likely an indication of sub-optimal instruction scheduling for an in-order core.

backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_bound.title: Backend ILOCK From SME2 Bound
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when a CPU instruction
is stalled on the SME2 unit due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU,
including predicate, flag and GPR updates.

backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_flags_b.title: Backend ILOCK From SME2 Flags Bound
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_flags_b.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when a CPU instruction
is stalled on the SME2 unit due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for flags produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_flags_b.units: percent of ilock cycles from cme

backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_gpr_bou.title: Backend ILOCK From SME2 GPR Bound
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_gpr_bou.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when a CPU instruction
is stalled on the SME2 unit due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for GPR produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_gpr_bou.units: percent of ilock cycles from cme

backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_predica.title: Backend ILOCK From SME2 Predicate Bound
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_predica.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when a CPU instruction
is stalled on the SME2 unit due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for predicate produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_from_cme_predica.units: percent of ilock cycles from cme

backend_stall_interlock_ls_bound.title: Backend Stall memory source interlock
backend_stall_interlock_ls_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of backend stalls due to an interlock, where the source of at least one interlock is a memory operation. Refer to `backend_mem_bound` and subsequent breakdown to check whether the interlock is likely affected by memory resources such as caches or TLBs, or is instead primarily affected by load-to-use latency.

backend_stall_interlock_ptr_chase_bound.title: Backend Stall pointer chase interlock Rate
backend_stall_interlock_ptr_chase_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of backend stalls due to a pointer chase interlock - that is, the source of at least one interlock is a memory instruction, and the destination is the address of another memory instruction. Refer to `backend_mem_bound` and subsequent breakdown to check whether the interlock is likely affected by memory resources such as caches or TLBs, or is instead primarily affected by load-to-use latency.

backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_bound.title: Backend ILOCK To SME2 Bound
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when the oldest SME2
instruction is stalled due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU,
including predicate, flag and GPR updates.

backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_flags_bou.title: Backend ILOCK To SME2 Flags Bound
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_flags_bou.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when the oldest SME2
instruction is stalled due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for flags produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_flags_bou.units: percent of ilock cycles to cme

backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_gpr_bound.title: Backend ILOCK To SME2 GPR Bound
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_gpr_bound.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when the oldest SME2
instruction is stalled due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for GPR produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_gpr_bound.units: percent of ilock cycles to cme

backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_predicate.title: Backend ILOCK To SME2 Predicate Bound
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_predicate.description:
This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the backend when the oldest SME2
instruction is stalled due to a data hazard between the SME2 unit and the CPU, where at least
one instruction is waiting for predicate bound produced by the CPU.
backend_stall_interlock_to_cme_predicate.units: percent of ilock cycles to cme

backend_stall_interlock_vpu_bound.title: Backend Stall VPU source interlock
backend_stall_interlock_vpu_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of backend stalls due to an interlock, where the source of at least one interlock is a VPU operation.

backend_stalled_cycles.title: Backend Stalled Cycles
backend_stalled_cycles.description: This metric is the percentage of cycles that were stalled due to resource constraints in the backend unit of the processor.

bad_speculation.title: Bad Speculation
bad_speculation.formula: (1 - STALL_SLOT / (3 * CPU_CYCLES)) * (1 - OP_RETIRED / OP_SPEC) * 100 + STALL_FRONTEND_FLUSH / CPU_CYCLES * 100
bad_speculation.description:
This metric is the percentage of total slots that executed operations and didn't retire due to a pipeline flush.
This indicates cycles that were utilized but inefficiently.

branch_direct_ratio.title: Branch Direct Ratio
branch_direct_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of direct branches retired to the total number of branches architecturally executed.

branch_indirect_ratio.title: Branch Indirect Ratio
branch_indirect_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of indirect branches retired, including function returns, to the total number of branches architecturally executed.

branch_misprediction_ratio.title: Branch Misprediction Ratio
branch_misprediction_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of branches mispredicted to the total number of branches architecturally executed. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the branch prediction unit.

branch_mpki.title: Branch MPKI
branch_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of branch mispredictions per thousand instructions executed.

branch_percentage.title: Branch Operations Percentage
branch_percentage.description: This metric measures branch operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

branch_return_ratio.title: Branch Return Ratio
branch_return_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of branches retired that are function returns to the total number of branches architecturally executed.

bus_read_requests_average_latency.title: Bus Read Request Average Latency
bus_read_requests_average_latency.description: This metric measures the average latency of read requests made by this processor on the system bus in CPU cycles

cas_far_ratio.title: Compare and Swap Far Ratio
cas_far_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of compare and swap instructions that did not execute locally to the PE to the total compare and swap instructions.

cas_near_pass_ratio.title: Compare and Swap Near Pass Ratio
cas_near_pass_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of passed compare and swap instructions speculatively executed locally to the PE that updated the location accessed to the total near compare and swap instructions.
cas_near_pass_ratio.units: per near compare and swap instruction

cas_near_ratio.title: Compare and Swap Near Ratio
cas_near_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of compare and swap instructions speculatively executed locally to the PE to the total compare and swap instructions.

cme_alloc_cycles_ratio.title: SME2 Allocation Cycles Ratio
cme_alloc_cycles_ratio.description:
This metric is measures the ratio of cycles where the CPU had an SME2 unit allocated to it,
such that the SME and Streaming SVE state of the CPU is held in that SME2
to the total number of CPU cycles.

cme_arb_pending_ratio.title: SME2 Arbitration Pending Cycles Ratio
cme_arb_pending_ratio.description:
This metric is measures the ratio of cycles where the CPU is in arbitration while attempting
to access an SME2 unit to the total number of CPU cycles.

crypto_percentage.title: Crypto Operations Percentage
crypto_percentage.description: This metric measures crypto operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

dtlb_mpki.title: DTLB MPKI
dtlb_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of data TLB Walks per thousand instructions executed.

dtlb_walk_average_depth.title: DTLB Walk Average Depth of Accesses
dtlb_walk_average_depth.description: This metric measures the average depth of the Instruction TLB walks for a data TLB refill

dtlb_walk_average_latency.title: DTLB Walk Average Latency
dtlb_walk_average_latency.description: This metric measures the average latency of data TLB walks in CPU cycles

dtlb_walk_block_ratio.title: DTLB Walk Block Ratio
dtlb_walk_block_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of data TLB Walks that returned a block to the total number of data TLB accesses. Block size is any memory block larger than the page granule size set by the system.

dtlb_walk_page_ratio.title: DTLB Walk Page Ratio
dtlb_walk_page_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of data TLB Walks that returned a page to the total number of data TLB accesses. Page size is determined by the page granule size set by the system.

dtlb_walk_ratio.title: DTLB Walk Ratio
dtlb_walk_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of data TLB Walks to the total number of data TLB accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the data TLB accesses.

fp16_percentage.title: Half Precision Floating Point Percentage
fp16_percentage.description: This metric measures half-precision floating point operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

fp32_percentage.title: Single Precision Floating Point Percentage
fp32_percentage.description: This metric measures single-precision floating point operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

fp64_percentage.title: Double Precision Floating Point Percentage
fp64_percentage.description: This metric measures double-precision floating point operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

frontend_bound.title: Frontend Bound
frontend_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total slots that were stalled due to resource constraints in the frontend of the processor.

frontend_cache_l1i_bound.title: Frontend Cache L1I Bound
frontend_cache_l1i_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to memory access latency issues caused by level 1 instruction cache misses.

frontend_cache_l2i_bound.title: Frontend Cache L2I Bound
frontend_cache_l2i_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to memory access latency issues caused by level 2 instruction cache misses.

frontend_core_bound.title: Frontend Core Bound
frontend_core_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to frontend core resource constraints not related to instruction fetch latency issues caused by memory access components.

frontend_core_flow_bound.title: Frontend Core Flow Bound
frontend_core_flow_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend as the decode unit is awaiting input from the branch prediction unit.

frontend_core_flush_bound.title: Frontend Core Flush Bound
frontend_core_flush_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend as the processor is recovering from a pipeline flush caused by bad speculation or other machine resteers.

frontend_mem_bound.title: Frontend Memory Bound
frontend_mem_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to frontend core resource constraints related to the instruction fetch latency issues caused by memory access components.

frontend_mem_cache_bound.title: Frontend Mem Cache Bound
frontend_mem_cache_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to instruction fetch latency issues caused by instruction cache misses.

frontend_mem_tlb_bound.title: Frontend Mem TLB Bound
frontend_mem_tlb_bound.description: This metric is the percentage of total cycles stalled in the frontend due to instruction fetch latency issues caused by instruction TLB misses.

frontend_stalled_cycles.title: Frontend Stalled Cycles
frontend_stalled_cycles.description: This metric is the percentage of cycles that were stalled due to resource constraints in the frontend unit of the processor.

instruction_fetch_average_latency.title: Instruction Fetch Average Latency
instruction_fetch_average_latency.description: This metric measures the average latency of instruction fetches in CPU cycles

integer_dp_percentage.title: Integer Operations Percentage
integer_dp_percentage.description: This metric measures scalar integer operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

ipc.title: Instructions Per Cycle
ipc.description: This metric measures the number of instructions retired per cycle.

itlb_mpki.title: ITLB MPKI
itlb_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of instruction TLB Walks per thousand instructions executed.

itlb_walk_average_depth.title: ITLB Walk Average Depth of Accesses
itlb_walk_average_depth.description: This metric measures the average depth of the Instruction TLB walks for an instruction TLB refill

itlb_walk_average_latency.title: ITLB Walk Average Latency
itlb_walk_average_latency.description: This metric measures the average latency of instruction TLB walks in CPU cycles

itlb_walk_block_ratio.title: ITLB Walk Block Ratio
itlb_walk_block_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of instruction TLB Walks that returned a block to the total number of instruction TLB accesses. Block size is any memory block larger than the page granule size set by the system.

itlb_walk_page_ratio.title: ITLB Walk Page Ratio
itlb_walk_page_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of instruction TLB Walks that returned a page to the total number of instruction TLB accesses. Page size is determined by the page granule size set by the system.

itlb_walk_ratio.title: ITLB Walk Ratio
itlb_walk_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of instruction TLB Walks to the total number of instruction TLB accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the instruction TLB accesses.

l1d_cache_miss_ratio.title: L1D Cache Miss Ratio
l1d_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 1 data cache accesses missed to the total number of level 1 data cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 data cache.

l1d_cache_mpki.title: L1D Cache MPKI
l1d_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 1 data cache accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

l1d_tlb_miss_ratio.title: L1 Data TLB Miss Ratio
l1d_tlb_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 1 data TLB accesses missed to the total number of level 1 data TLB accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 data TLB.

l1d_tlb_mpki.title: L1 Data TLB MPKI
l1d_tlb_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 1 data TLB accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

l1i_cache_miss_ratio.title: L1I Cache Miss Ratio
l1i_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 1 instruction cache accesses missed to the total number of level 1 instruction cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 instruction cache.

l1i_cache_mpki.title: L1I Cache MPKI
l1i_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 1 instruction cache accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

l1i_tlb_miss_ratio.title: L1 Instruction TLB Miss Ratio
l1i_tlb_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 1 instruction TLB accesses missed to the total number of level 1 instruction TLB accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 1 instruction TLB.

l1i_tlb_mpki.title: L1 Instruction TLB MPKI
l1i_tlb_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 1 instruction TLB accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

l2_prefetcher_accuracy_l1hwprf_exclusive.title: L2 Cache Prefetcher Accuracy (L1 HW prefetch exclusive)
l2_prefetcher_accuracy_l1hwprf_exclusive.description: This metric measures L2D cache prefetcher accuracy excluding L1 hardware prefetch requests

l2_prefetcher_coverage_l1hwprf_exclusive.title: L2 Cache Prefetcher Coverage (L1 HW prefetch exclusive)
l2_prefetcher_coverage_l1hwprf_exclusive.description: This metric measures L2D cache prefetcher coverage excluding L1 hardware prefetch requests

l2_prefetcher_timeliness_l1hwprf_exclusi.title: L2 Cache Prefetcher Timeliness (L1 HW prefetch exclusive)
l2_prefetcher_timeliness_l1hwprf_exclusi.description: This metric measures L2D cache prefetcher timeliness excluding L1 hardware prefetch requests

l2_tlb_miss_ratio.title: L2 Unified TLB Miss Ratio
l2_tlb_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 2 unified TLB accesses missed to the total number of level 2 unified TLB accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 2 TLB.

l2_tlb_mpki.title: L2 Unified TLB MPKI
l2_tlb_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 2 unified TLB accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

l2d_cache_miss_ratio.title: L2D Cache Miss Ratio
l2d_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 2 cache data accesses missed to the total number of level 2 cache data accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of data accesses in the level 2 cache, which is a unified cache that stores both data and instruction. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

l2d_cache_mpki.title: L2D Cache MPKI
l2d_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 2 unified cache data accesses missed per thousand instructions executed. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

l2i_cache_miss_ratio.title: L2I Cache Miss Ratio
l2i_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 2 cache instruction accesses missed to the total number of level 2 cache instruction accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of instruction accesses in the level 2 cache, which is a unified cache that stores both data and instruction. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

l2i_cache_mpki.title: L2I Cache MPKI
l2i_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 2 unified cache instruction accesses missed per thousand instructions executed. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

l3_cache_miss_ratio.title: L3 Cache Miss Ratio
l3_cache_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of level 3 cache accesses missed to the total number of level 3 cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the level 3 cache, which is a unified cache that stores both data and instruction. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

l3_cache_mpki.title: L3 Cache MPKI
l3_cache_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of level 3 unified cache accesses missed per thousand instructions executed. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a unified cache.

ll_cache_read_hit_ratio.title: LL Cache Read Hit Ratio
ll_cache_read_hit_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of last level cache read accesses hit in the cache to the total number of last level cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the last level cache for read traffic. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a system level cache.

ll_cache_read_miss_ratio.title: LL Cache Read Miss Ratio
ll_cache_read_miss_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of last level cache read accesses missed to the total number of last level cache accesses. This gives an indication of the effectiveness of the last level cache for read traffic. Note that cache accesses in this cache are either data memory access or instruction fetch as this is a system level cache.

ll_cache_read_mpki.title: LL Cache Read MPKI
ll_cache_read_mpki.description: This metric measures the number of last level cache read accesses missed per thousand instructions executed.

load_average_latency.title: Load Operation Average Latency
load_average_latency.description: This metric measures the average latency of load operations in CPU cycles

load_ls_percentage.title: Load Operations Percentage of Load/Store Operations
load_ls_percentage.description: This metric measures load operations as a percentage of load and store operations speculatively executed.

load_percentage.title: Load Operations Percentage
load_percentage.description: This metric measures load operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

load_store_percentage.title: Load/Store Operations Percentage
load_store_percentage.description: This metric measures load and store operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

lse_atomics_ratio.title: LSE Atomics Ratio
lse_atomics_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of LSE atomics instructions speculatively executed locally to the PE to the total load and store instructions.

lse_load_ratio.title: LSE Load Ratio
lse_load_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of LSE load instructions speculatively executed to the total LSE instructions.

lse_store_ratio.title: LSE Store Ratio
lse_store_ratio.description: This metric measures the ratio of LSE store instructions speculatively executed to the total LSE instructions.

retiring.title: Retiring
retiring.description: This metric is the percentage of total slots that retired operations, which indicates cycles that were utilized efficiently.

scalar_fp_percentage.title: Floating Point Operations Percentage
scalar_fp_percentage.description: This metric measures scalar floating point operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

simd_percentage.title: Advanced SIMD Operations Percentage
simd_percentage.description: This metric measures advanced SIMD operations as a percentage of total operations speculatively executed.

sm_active_cycles_ratio.title: SM Active Cycles Ratio
sm_active_cycles_ratio.description:
This metric is measures the ratio of cycles when PSTATE.SM was enabled
to the total number of CPU cycles.

sme_percentage.title: SME Operations Percentage
sme_percentage.description:
This metric measures Scalable Matrix extension data processing operations as a percentage
of operations speculatively executed.

store_ls_percentage.title: Store Operations Percentage of Load/Store Operations
store_ls_percentage.description: This metric measures store operations as a percentage of load and store operations speculatively executed.

store_percentage.title: Store Operations Percentage
store_percentage.description: This metric measures store operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

sve_percentage.title: Scalable Vector Operations Percentage
sve_percentage.description: This metric measures scalable vector operations as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

sve_predicate_empty_percentage.title: SVE Empty Predicate Percentage
sve_predicate_empty_percentage.description: This metric measures scalable vector operations with no active predicates as a percentage of sve predicated operations speculatively executed.

sve_predicate_full_percentage.title: SVE Full Predicate Percentage
sve_predicate_full_percentage.description: This metric measures scalable vector operations with all active predicates as a percentage of sve predicated operations speculatively executed.

sve_predicate_partial_percentage.title: SVE Partial Predicate Percentage
sve_predicate_partial_percentage.description: This metric measures scalable vector operations with at least one active predicates as a percentage of sve predicated operations speculatively executed.

sve_predicate_percentage.title: SVE Predicate Percentage
sve_predicate_percentage.description: This metric measures scalable vector operations with predicates as a percentage of operations speculatively executed.

system_l3_cache_hit_ratio.title: System L3 Cache Hit Ratio
system_l3_cache_hit_ratio.description:
This metric measures the ratio of system L3 cache hits to the total memory accesses that missed
in the private L2 cache of the core. This metric indicates that the workload is memory bound obtaining data from L3 cache.

system_peer_cluster_cache_hit_ratio.title: System Peer Cluster Cache Hit Ratio
system_peer_cluster_cache_hit_ratio.description:
This metric measures the ratio of peer cluster cache hits to the total memory accesses that missed
in the private L2 cache of the core.
This metric indicates that the workload is memory bound obtaining data from peer cores in the compute cluster.

za_active_cycles_ratio.title: ZA Active Cycles Ratio
za_active_cycles_ratio.description:
This metric is measures the ratio of cycles when PSTATE.ZA was enabled
to the total number of CPU cycles.

Topdown_Backend.title: Topdown Backend
Topdown_Backend.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyze a backend bound workload.

CME_Ilock_To_CME.title: Interlock to SME2
CME_Ilock_To_CME.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics that measure the percentage of processor cycles stalled in backend of the processor due to the oldest SME2 instruction being stalled due to a data hazard.

CME_Ilock_From_CME.title: Interlock from SME2
CME_Ilock_From_CME.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics that measure the percentage of processor cycles stalled in backend of the processor due to CPU instruction being stalled due to a data hazard from SME2.

Cycle_Accounting.title: Cycle Accounting
Cycle_Accounting.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics that measure the percentage of processor cycles stalled in either frontend or backend of the processor.

Topdown_CME.title: Topdown SME2
Topdown_CME.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyse an SME2 bound workload.

Topdown_L1.title: Topdown Level 1
Topdown_L1.description: This metric group contains the first set of metrics to begin topdown analysis of application performance, which provide the percentage distribution of processor pipeline utilization.

Topdown_Frontend.title: Topdown Frontend
Topdown_Frontend.description: This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyse a frontend bound workload.

General.title: General
General.description: This metric group contains general CPU metrics for performance analysis.

MPKI.title: Misses Per Kilo Instructions
MPKI.description: This metric group contains metrics for different CPU resources that can be measured as misses per kilo instructions.

Miss_Ratio.title: Miss Ratio
Miss_Ratio.description: This metric group contains metrics to measure miss ratios of different processor resources.

SVE_Effectiveness.title: SVE Effectiveness
SVE_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of predicated SVE instruction execution on this processor.

FP_Precision_Mix.title: Floating Point Precision
FP_Precision_Mix.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the precision of floating point instruction execution on this processor.

Branch_Effectiveness.title: Branch Effectiveness
Branch_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of branch instruction execution on this processor.

ITLB_Effectiveness.title: Instruction TLB Effectiveness
ITLB_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of instruction TLB on this processor.

DTLB_Effectiveness.title: Data TLB Effectiveness
DTLB_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of data TLB on this processor.

L1I_Cache_Effectiveness.title: L1 Instruction Cache Effectiveness
L1I_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of L1 Instruction cache on this processor.

L1D_Cache_Effectiveness.title: L1 Data Cache Effectiveness
L1D_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of L1 Data Cache on this processor.

L2I_Cache_Effectiveness.title: L2I Unified Cache Effectiveness
L2I_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of instruction access in the L2 Unified Cache on this processor.

L2D_Cache_Effectiveness.title: L2D Unified Cache Effectiveness
L2D_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of data access in the L2 Unified Cache on this processor.

L3_Cache_Effectiveness.title: L3 Unified Cache Effectiveness
L3_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of L3 Unified Cache on this processor.

LL_Cache_Effectiveness.title: Last Level Cache Effectiveness
LL_Cache_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of Last Level Cache on this processor.

Operation_Mix.title: Speculative Operation Mix
Operation_Mix.description: This metric group provides the distribution of micro-operation types executed for the program.

Average_Latency.title: Average Latency
Average_Latency.description: This metric group contains metrics that provide average latencies of costly memory related operations by the CPU that can have variable number of cycles

Bus_Effectiveness.title: Bus Effectiveness
Bus_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of bus transactions issued by this processor

System_Memory_Effectiveness.title: System Memory Effectiveness
System_Memory_Effectiveness.description:
This metric group contains a set of metrics to analyze a system memory bound workload,
providing hierarchical data hits in system memory resources internal or external to the processor.

Atomics_Effectiveness.title: Atomics Effectiveness
Atomics_Effectiveness.description: This metric group contains metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of atomics execution on this processor.
